plugin.name: Mobile_Command_Pad
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Large clickable keypad mirror for mobile-friendly command use.
plugin.description:
Large clickable button pad for mobile/remote play. Buttons mirror the world's keypad assignments for: 0-9 . + - / *
Commands: commandpad : Toggle the miniwindow. commandpad show : Show the miniwindow. commandpad hide : Hide the miniwindow. commandpad reset : Reset the miniwindow position. commandpad refresh : Reload keypad assignments from the world file. commandpad nx stop : Stop the auto-nx helper.

muclient.script:
win = "mobile_command_pad_" .. GetPluginID()
local keypad_order = { "/", "*", "-", "7", "8", "9", "4", "5", "6", "1", "2", "3", "0", ".", "+", }
local state = { x = 40, y = 120, show = true, }
local ui = { header_h = 38, pad = 10, gap = 8, button_h = 74, button_w = 140, width = 456, height = 460, }
local keypad_commands = {}
local nx_helper = { enabled = true, delay_seconds = 0.60, max_steps = 150, }
local nx_state = { active = false, steps = 0, }
local drag_state = { active = false, mouse_x = 0, mouse_y = 0, win_x = 0, win_y = 0, }
local function trim(value) return (value or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
local function save_state() SetVariable("x", tostring(state.x)) SetVariable("y", tostring(state.y)) SetVariable("show", state.show and "y" or "n") end
local function load_state() state.x = tonumber(GetVariable("x")) or state.x state.y = tonumber(GetVariable("y")) or state.y state.show = GetVariable("show") ~= "n" end
local function xml_unescape(text) text = text or "" text = text:gsub("<", "<") text = text:gsub(">", ">") text = text:gsub(""", "\"") text = text:gsub("'", "'") text = text:gsub("&", "&") return text end
local function read_file(path) local f = io.open(path, "r") if not f then return nil end
local data = f:read("*a") f:close() return data end
local function get_world_file_path() local path = GetInfo(54) or "" path = trim(path)
if path ~= "" then return path end
return "" end
local function load_keypad_commands() local commands = {} local world_path = get_world_file_path()
for _, key in ipairs(keypad_order) do commands[key] = "" end
if world_path == "" then keypad_commands = commands return false end
local content = read_file(world_path) if not content then keypad_commands = commands return false end
local keypad_block = content:match("<keypad.-</keypad>") if not keypad_block then keypad_commands = commands return false end
for key_name, send_text in keypad_block:gmatch('<key name="(.-)".->%s*<send>(.-)</send>%s*</key>') do if commands[key_name] ~= nil then commands[key_name] = trim(xml_unescape(send_text)) end end
keypad_commands = commands return true end
local function get_button_geometry(index) local col = ((index - 1) % 3) local row = math.floor((index - 1) / 3) local left = ui.pad + (col * (ui.button_w + ui.gap)) local top = ui.header_h + ui.pad + (row * (ui.button_h + ui.gap)) local right = left + ui.button_w local bottom = top + ui.button_h return left, top, right, bottom end
local function get_button_command(key_name) local command = keypad_commands[key_name] or "" command = trim(command) if command == "" then return "(unassigned)" end return command end
local function draw_button(index, key_name) local left, top, right, bottom = get_button_geometry(index) local fill = ColourNameToRGB("midnightblue") local edge1 = ColourNameToRGB("deepskyblue") local edge2 = ColourNameToRGB("white") local key_colour = ColourNameToRGB("gold") local cmd_colour = ColourNameToRGB("white") local command = get_button_command(key_name)
WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, left, top, right, bottom, fill) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_3d_rect, left, top, right, bottom, edge1, edge2)
WindowText(win, "key_font", key_name, left + 8, top + 6, 0, 0, key_colour) WindowText(win, "cmd_font", command, left + 8, top + 28, right - 8, bottom - 8, cmd_colour) end
local function add_hotspots() WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win)
WindowAddHotspot(win, "drag_header", 0, 0, ui.width, ui.header_h, "", "", "", "", "", "Drag to move", miniwin.cursor_both_arrow, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "drag_header", "OnDragMove", "OnDragRelease", 0)
for i, key_name in ipairs(keypad_order) do local left, top, right, bottom = get_button_geometry(i) WindowAddHotspot( win, "btn_" .. tostring(i), left, top, right, bottom, "", "", "OnButtonPress", "", "", "Send keypad command: " .. get_button_command(key_name), miniwin.cursor_hand, 0 ) end end
function RedrawPad() WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("black")) WindowGradient(win, 0, 0, ui.width, ui.header_h, ColourNameToRGB("darkred"), ColourNameToRGB("black"), miniwin.gradient_horizontal) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_3d_rect, 0, 0, ui.width, ui.height, ColourNameToRGB("gray"), ColourNameToRGB("white"))
WindowText(win, "title_font", "Mobile Keypad", 12, 9, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("white")) WindowText(win, "sub_font", "Mirrors saved numpad assignments", 180, 11, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("silver"))
for i, key_name in ipairs(keypad_order) do draw_button(i, key_name) end
add_hotspots() WindowShow(win, state.show) end
local function create_window() WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, ui.width, ui.height, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_keep_hotspots, ColourNameToRGB("black")) WindowFont(win, "title_font", "Verdana", 12, true, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "sub_font", "Verdana", 8, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "key_font", "Verdana", 12, true, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "cmd_font", "Verdana", 10, true, false, false, false, 0) WindowPosition(win, state.x, state.y, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_absolute_location) RedrawPad() end
local function execute_real_nx() EnableAlias("commandpad_nx_alias", false) Execute("nx") EnableAlias("commandpad_nx_alias", true) end
local function stop_auto_nx(message) nx_state.active = false nx_state.steps = 0 EnableTimer("commandpad_nx_timer", false)
if message and message ~= "" then ColourNote("cornflowerblue", "", "[CommandPad] " .. message) end end
local function start_auto_nx() if not nx_helper.enabled then execute_real_nx() return end
nx_state.active = true nx_state.steps = 0 EnableTimer("commandpad_nx_timer", true) execute_real_nx() end
local function run_button_command(command) command = trim(command)
if command == "" or command == "(unassigned)" then ColourNote("white", "red", "[CommandPad] This keypad button is unassigned.") return end
if command:lower() == "nx" then start_auto_nx() return end
Execute(command) end
function OnButtonPress(flags, hotspot_id) local index = tonumber((hotspot_id:gsub("^btn_", ""))) or 0 local key_name = keypad_order[index]
if key_name then run_button_command(get_button_command(key_name)) end end
function OnDragMove(flags, hotspot_id) local mouse_x = WindowInfo(win, 17) local mouse_y = WindowInfo(win, 18)
if not drag_state.active then drag_state.active = true drag_state.mouse_x = mouse_x drag_state.mouse_y = mouse_y drag_state.win_x = state.x drag_state.win_y = state.y end
state.x = drag_state.win_x + (mouse_x - drag_state.mouse_x) state.y = drag_state.win_y + (mouse_y - drag_state.mouse_y)
WindowPosition(win, state.x, state.y, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_absolute_location) end
function OnDragRelease(flags, hotspot_id) drag_state.active = false save_state() end
function TogglePad() state.show = not state.show save_state() WindowShow(win, state.show) end
function ShowPad() state.show = true save_state() WindowShow(win, true) end
function HidePad() state.show = false save_state() WindowShow(win, false) end
function ResetPad() state.x = 40 state.y = 120 save_state() WindowPosition(win, state.x, state.y, miniwin.pos_stretch_to_view, miniwin.create_absolute_location) WindowShow(win, state.show) end
function RefreshPad() local ok = load_keypad_commands() RedrawPad()
if ok then ColourNote("cornflowerblue", "", "[CommandPad] Keypad assignments refreshed from the world file.") else ColourNote("white", "red", "[CommandPad] Could not read keypad assignments from the saved world file.") end end
-- ============================================================== -- BEGIN OPTIONAL NX HELPER -- Remove this section plus the nx alias/timer/trigger above if -- you ever want the keypad to send plain nx again. -- ============================================================== -- ============================================================== -- END OPTIONAL NX HELPER -- ==============================================================
function OnPluginInstall() load_state() load_keypad_commands() create_window() ColourNote("cornflowerblue", "", "Mobile Command Pad v2 loaded. Type ", "white", "", "commandpad refresh", "cornflowerblue", "", " after changing keypad bindings.") end
function OnPluginEnable() WindowShow(win, state.show) end
function OnPluginDisable() WindowShow(win, false) EnableTimer("commandpad_nx_timer", false) end
function OnPluginSaveState() save_state() end
function OnPluginClose() WindowDelete(win) end
